name: Golden Potatoes with Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes and carrots in boiling water for 5 minutes; drain.
2. Heat oil in a 10-inch cast iron skillet over medium-high heat, swirling to coat the bottom of the pan.
3. Add potatoes and carrots; sauté for 5 minutes.
4. Add onion, thyme, salt, and pepper; continue to sauté for another 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
